message:
fix(search,lib): suppress unused variable warnings and improve search blending clarity

- Prefix unused `fmt` bindings with underscore across 22 structured-format
  branches in lib.rs to silence compiler warnings while preserving the
  if-let match structure for future format-specific output paths
- Add clarifying comment in encryption.rs about the Payload API usage
  for AES-GCM decryption concatenation
- Add documentation comment in query.rs explaining the whitespace-invariant
  FNV hashing strategy for content deduplication
- Hoist `fast_s` variable above the if-else in two_tier_search.rs so both
  the refined and unrefined scoring branches share the same normalized
  fast-score lookup, eliminating a redundant unwrap_or call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
